steps.title: Make the sentence a question
steps.content: The sentence begins with "How" and is followed by a sentence that explains the penguins' speed. That setup requires a direct question, so the words must be inverted and the sentence must end with a question mark.

steps.title: Reject nonquestion forms
steps.content: Choice A has a statement word order and an exclamation point. Choice B has the right word order but ends with a period. Choice C has statement word order and a period. The answer is D.
